name: Mac Skillet Dinner
recipeIngredient: 1 lb lean ground beef, turkey or chicken
6 oz mexi-corn or regular corn, drained
2 whole dried red chili peppers, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the beef with the onion, garlic, and celery. Drain off any excess fat.
2. Add mushrooms and corn, stirring until cooked.
3. Add spices, crushing the chili peppers if using fresh, and all remaining ingredients.
4. When the mixture is hot and bubbly, add the drained cooked pasta.
5. Gently stir to coat the pasta.
6. Serve hot in large bowls.
